कुल &ािधकृत पद सं(या कुल &ािधकृत पद सं(या 208 -- 5 of 17 -- 6 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(i)] MINISTRY OF PERSONNEL, PUBLIC GRIEVANCES AND PENSIONS (Department of Personnel and Training} NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 29th April, 2016. G.S.R. 469(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (i) of Section 3 of the All India Services Act, 1951 (61 of 1951), read with sub-rule (2) of rule 4 of the Indian Administrative Service (Cadre) Rules, 1954, the Central Government, in consultation with the Government of Telangana, hereby makes the following regulations further to amend the Indian Administrative Service (Fixation of Cadre Strength) Regulations, 1955, namely:─ (1) These Regulations may be called the Indian Administrative Service (Fixation of cadre Strength) Amendment Regulations, 2016. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In the Indian Administrative Service (Fixation of Cadre Strength) Regulations, 1955, in the schedule, for the heading “Telangana” and the entries occurring thereunder, the following shall be substituted namely:─ “Telangana Senior Duty Posts under the State Government 114 Chief Secretary to the Government 1 Special Chief Secretary, Finance 1 Chief Commissioner of Land Admin. & EO Special Chief Secretary 1 Principal Secretary to Government AHDDF 1 Principal Secretary to Government BC Welfare 1 Principal Secretary to Government Education 1 DG, Dr. MCR HRD Institute & EO Principal Secretary 1 Addl./Pr. Note (2): The principal regulations were published in the Gazette of India vide SRO No. 3350 dated 22nd October 1955. EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(i)] MINISTRY OF PERSONNEL, PUBLIC GRIEVANCES AND PENSIONS (Department of Personnel and Training) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 29th April, 2016 G.S.R. 470(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (i) of Section 3 of the All India Services Act, 1951 (61 of 1951), the Central Government, in consultation with the Government of Telangana hereby makes the following rules further to amend the Indian Administrative Service (Pay) Rules, 2007, namely: ─ 1. (1) These rules may be called the Indian Administrative Service (Pay) Amendment Rules, 2016. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the official Gazette. 2. In the Indian Administrative Service (Pay) Rules, 2007, in schedule II,– in Part A relating to posts carrying pay above the senior scale of pay of the Indian Administrative Service under the State Governments, in the table, for the entry “Telangana” occurring in the first column and corresponding entries in the second column, the following shall be substituted namely:─ “TELANGANA Chief Secretary to the Government Rs.80000/-(fixed) Special Chief Secretary, Finance Rs.80000/-(fixed) Chief Commissioner of Land Admin. & EO Special Chief Secretary Rs.80000/-(fixed) Principal Secretary to Government AHDDF HAG Rs. 67000/-(annual increment @ 3%) 79,000/- Principal Secretary to Government BC Welfare HAG Rs. 67000/-(annual increment @ 3%) 79,000/- Principal Secretary to Government Education HAG Rs. 67000/-(annual increment @ 3%) 79,000/- DG, Dr. MCR HRD Institute & EO Principal Secretary HAG Rs. 67000/-(annual increment @ 3%) 79,000/- Addl./Pr.
